name: Creamed Ground Beef Over Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium heat until browned and no longer pink.
2. Add onion and garlic to the skillet; sauté for 2-3 minutes or until softened.
3. Stir in salt, cayenne pepper, and black pepper. Cook for an additional minute.
4. Pour in milk and cream; stir well to combine.
5. Simmer over low heat for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve the creamy ground beef sauce over mashed potatoes.
